Skill Description: Evaluating the credibility of online sources and distinguishing between factual news, opinions, or fabrications.
Key Learning Objective: Identify reliable websites, verify primary sources, and understand the difference between facts and subjective views.
Fact-Checking Method: Cross-referencing primary sources, Fact vs Opinion analysis, and evaluating expert testimony.
Online Risk Mitigation: Developing a skeptical mindset towards sensationalist headlines and relying on pre-vetted, trusted websites.

Skill Description: Identifying and responding to cyberbullying and online harassment.
Key Learning Objective: Recognize that persistent cruelty constitutes bullying and learn appropriate social-emotional responses.
Online Risk Mitigation: Maintaining emotional composure and seeking adult intervention or support.

Skill Description: Protecting personal data and mitigating risks of digital violence.
Key Learning Objective: Apply basic digital security principles to prevent cyber-attacks, blackmail, and data theft.
Online Risk Mitigation: Utilizing basic security protocols to reduce exposure to digital violence.
